MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FOREST AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12th December, 2018 S.O. 6147(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of section 19 of the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby amends the notification of the Government of India, in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests number S.O. 394(E), dated the 16th April, 1987. In the said notification, in the Table, after serial No. 14 and the entries relating thereto, the following serial No. and entries relating thereto shall be inserted, namely:- (1) (2) (3) “15 Scientist ‘D’, ‘E’ and ‘F’, the Central Pollution Control Board Whole of India.” [F. No. Q-15014/17/2018-CPW] RITESH KUMAR SINGH, Jt. Secy. Note: The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 394(E), dated the 16th April, 1987 and subsequently amended vide S.O. 237 (E), dated the 29th March, 1989, S.O. 656 (E), dated the 21st August, 1989, S.O. 624 (E), dated the 3rd September, 1996, G.S.R. 587 (E), dated the 1st September, 2006, S.O. 2412 (E), dated the 22nd September, 2009, and S.O. 2763 (E), dated the 10th November, 2010. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
